title: The Triple Wavelength Laser That’s Changing Hair Removal
excerpt: In the ever-evolving world of aesthetic treatments, not all laser hair removal  devices are built the same. While many systems promise...
body_text:
In the ever-evolving world of aesthetic treatments, not all laser hair removal devices are built the same. While many systems promise smooth results, only a few deliver a truly effective, comfortable, and inclusive solution for long-term hair reduction.

One technology that stands out from the rest is the Alma Soprano Ice Platinum — known for its triple wavelength innovation, its ability to treat all skin tones, and a reputation for being virtually painless. But what makes this system so unique? And why is the 3-wavelength approach considered a gold standard in modern aesthetics?

Let’s break it down.

What Is Alma Soprano Ice Platinum?
Alma Soprano Ice Platinum is an advanced medical-grade device designed for laser hair removal that blends three laser wavelengths into one. This multi-dimensional technology allows it to target different depths within the hair follicle and treat a wide range of hair types and skin tones — all in a single session.

With its SHR (Super Hair Removal) technology, ICE™ contact cooling system, and Trio Clustered Diode Laser, this treatment goes beyond traditional methods, delivering results that are powerful, safe, and comfortable.


[Image: Alma Soprano 3 Wavelength Technology]

Why 3 Wavelengths Matter in Laser Hair Removal
The key to Alma Soprano Ice Platinum’s success lies in its trio of wavelengths — each of which is specifically engineered to target hair at different levels of the follicle and respond to different skin characteristics. Here’s what each one does:

1. 755nm Alexandrite Wavelength
Targets: The hair bulb and superficial follicles

Ideal For: Light, thin hair

Effective On: Fair skin tones

Common Areas: Face, arms, upper lip, brow line

This wavelength has a high melanin absorption rate, making it especially effective for lighter and finer hairs — often the most difficult to treat using standard lasers.

2. 810nm Diode Wavelength
Targets: The mid-level follicle

Ideal For: All hair types and most skin tones

Known For: Balance of depth, power, and safety

Common Areas: Legs, arms, chest, back

Considered the gold standard in traditional laser hair removal, this wavelength offers a well-rounded solution suitable for a wide variety of clients.

3. 1064nm Nd:YAG Wavelength
Targets: Deep-rooted hair follicles

Ideal For: Darker or tanned skin

Minimises: Risk of pigmentation or burns

Common Areas: Bikini line, underarms, beard area

This wavelength penetrates deeper into the skin with lower melanin absorption, making it safer for darker skin types or areas prone to ingrown hairs and coarser growth.


Combined Power: What Happens When All Three Wavelengths Work Together?
Instead of switching between devices or compromising on settings, Alma Soprano Ice Platinum delivers all three wavelengths simultaneously in every pulse. This provides:
Comprehensive coverage across hair types and depths

Maximized safety regardless of skin tone

More effective sessions with faster, lasting results

By targeting the bulge, bulb, and papilla of the hair follicle, this triple-action approach ensures no part of the follicle is left untreated.


What Are the Benefits of Triple Wavelength Laser Hair Removal?
Whether you're new to laser treatments or considering upgrading from another system, here’s what makes Alma’s triple wavelength platform a standout:

1. Safe for All Skin Tones
Unlike older laser technologies that struggled with darker skin, Alma’s platform is designed with diversity in mind — offering effective treatment for Fitzpatrick skin types I to VI.

2. Virtually Pain-Free
Thanks to ICE™ cooling technology, the sapphire tip keeps the skin surface chilled during treatment. Clients often describe it as a warm glide or gentle flick, rather than a sharp sting.

3. Faster Sessions
With its large applicator and in-motion sweeping technique, full-body laser sessions can be completed in under 90 minutes — with no need to pause between passes.

4. No Downtime
Return to your day immediately after your appointment. Aside from mild redness (which fades within hours), you won’t need to adjust your plans — just apply SPF and follow gentle skincare guidelines.

5. Customised for Every Body
From fine facial hair to coarse growth in the bikini area, this system adapts to your body’s unique needs — making it ideal for all genders and hair textures.


Common Treatment Areas
Alma Soprano Ice Platinum is suitable for virtually all parts of the body:
Face: Upper lip, chin, jawline, cheeks

Body: Arms, legs, chest, stomach, back

Sensitive areas: Bikini, Brazilian, underarms

Male zones: Beard line, shoulders, torso



What to Expect During Your Sessions
Your journey to smoother skin is carefully guided — from consultation to completion.
1. Consultation & Patch Test
Skin type, hair texture, and goals are assessed. A small test patch ensures compatibility and safety.

2. Pre-Treatment Prep
You’ll be asked to shave the area 24 hours before treatment. Avoid waxing, plucking, and tanning beforehand.

3. The Session
A cool gel is applied, followed by gentle gliding of the laser applicator. Depending on the area, sessions range from 10 to 60 minutes.

4. Aftercare
Expect mild redness, similar to a light sunburn. Avoid heat, exfoliation, or intense exercise for 24–48 hours, and wear SPF daily.

How Many Sessions Are Needed?
Because hair grows in cycles, multiple sessions are needed to achieve long-term results.
6 to 8 sessions are typically recommended

Spaced 4–6 weeks apart

Occasional maintenance sessions (once a year) may be suggested

Results are progressive, with most clients experiencing noticeable improvement after the second or third session.

Triple Wavelength, Triple Confidence
Incorporating three advanced wavelengths into one harmonious system, Alma Soprano Ice Platinum offers a new standard in laser hair removal: safe, effective, inclusive, and gentle.
This is more than a cosmetic upgrade — it’s a confidence investment. One that frees you from the daily routine of razors, waxing, and worry. One that helps your skin glow with ease and elegance, every day.

Ready to Begin?
Book your free consultation with a certified aesthetic professional to explore whether Alma’s triple wavelength laser is right for you.

Smooth. Safe. Smart.Let innovation meet beauty — and let your confidence shine through.
